title: PMS 831144 Beige Air Fryer Sheets, 14 cm. x 20.5 cm. (80-Pack) -Perforated Non-Stick Liners, Plastic
features: NON-STICK PERFECTION: Say goodbye to messy, sticky air fryer baskets with the air fryer sheets 14 cm. x 20.5 cm. - designed to provide a perfect non-stick surface for evenly cooked, flavorful dishes, and hassle-free clean-up after every use.

INNOVATIVELY PERFORATED: Experience ultimate cooking efficiency with our perforated liners that optimize air circulation, ensuring every batch comes out with the right amount of crispiness and an even, golden-brown finish.

VERSATILITY & COMPATIBILITY: Designed to fit a variety of air fryer brands and models, these versatile sheets are perfect for use in your favorite air fryers, toaster ovens, and other kitchen appliances, ensuring an effortless, non-stick cooking experience.

ECO-FRIENDLY & FOOD SAFE: Air fryer sheets are crafted from high-quality, food-grade, and eco-friendly materials. Rest assured knowing that the food is cooked safely on these liners, and contributing to a greener environment with every use.

BULK PACK FOR EXTENDED USE: Each 80-Pack of our air fryer sheets ensures a continuous supply of high-quality liners for your kitchen appliances, saving you time and effort, and providing the ultimate convenience for true cooking enthusiasts.
description: Enjoy a cleaner, healthier cooking experience with our air fryer sheets - a pack of 80, measuring 14 cm by 20.5 cm. These perforated, non-stick liners are perfect for an assortment of kitchen appliances. Engineered to distribute heat evenly, they ensure your food is cooked perfectly every time. The non-stick surface prevents food from adhering, making clean-up a breeze. Moreover, their perforated design allows for maximum airflow, promoting crispier results. Ideal for baking, grilling, and frying, these versatile liners are a must-have for your culinary adventures. Say goodbye to the hassle of stubborn food residue and embrace the simplicity of our air fryer sheets.
